---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Ale Campoy"
date: "2026-04-08"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown


```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
# 5 histogramas por grupo, 20 bins cada uno
A <- matrix(runif(5*20), nrow = 5)
B <- matrix(runif(5*20), nrow = 5)

X <- rbind(A, B)
sizes <- c(5, 5)

eqdist.etest(X, sizes, R = 999)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.


```{r}
x <- rnorm(50)
y <- rnorm(50, mean = 0.5)

cramer.test(x, y)
```


```{r}
library("vegan")

X <- rbind(A, B)
group <- factor(rep(c("A","B"), each = 5))

adonis2(X ~ group, method = "euclidean")
```
